title: 府中ウマ娘Sの後に・理想、見据えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an incredible victory, Mejiro Dober shows a
new side of herself to the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting as many people as possible to watch her
race, she proudly declares her intent to challenge
Air Groove at the Queen Elizabeth II Cup in front
of the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All that's left now is to wait—the Queen Elizabeth
II Cup isn't too far off!
